hero.headline: Central India's Pioneer in Joint Replacement
hero.tagline: Excellence achieved through trust and dedication

alert.title: Important Notice
alert.message: Dr. Jinsiwale is not available at any other hospital. Appointments are mandatory. Please call the helpline before visiting.

doctor.name: Dr. A.K. Jinsiwale
doctor.title: Joint Replacement Surgeon
doctor.aboutHeader: Know about Dr. Anant Kumar Jinsiwale
doctor.bio: Dr. Anant Kumar Jinsiwale is one of Central India's leading figures in Joint Replacement. With a distinguished career spanning over 39 years, he has performed more than 10,000 joint replacements and over 60,000 total surgeries. He is a pioneer in promoting Medical Tourism in the region and has received advanced surgical training in over 10 countries.
affiliations: Visiting Consultant: Care CHL Hospital, Indore
highlights: Pioneer In Joint Replacement Surgery (started in 1991) with Advanced Techniques
Pioneer Surgeon of Central India to Start Total Knee Replacement with Navigation
Started Medical Tourism in Joint Replacement Surgery Since 2010
Computerized Navigation Robotic Knee Replacement Specialist
Expert in Patient Specific Technology & 'I Assist' Tools

items.title: Knee Treatment
items.desc: ACL Reconstruction Surgery · Revision ACL Reconstruction · PCL Reconstruction Surgery · Cartilage Repair · Knee Arthritis Treatments · Knee Fracture Repair · Ligament Repair Surgery · Meniscus Tear Surgery, Stem Cell therapy
items.intro: The knee is a complex joint critical for mobility. Dr. Jinsiwale specializes in advanced knee procedures, from keyhole ACL reconstructions to complex revision surgeries. We restore joint function using state-of-the-art repair techniques.

technology.title: Double-Bundle ACL Reconstruction & Cartilage Repair
technology.content: We utilize advanced double-bundle techniques for ACL reconstruction, mimicking natural anatomy for superior stability. Cartilage repair procedures like microfracture or OATS are done using minimally invasive arthroscopy.
technology.imageCaption: Advanced knee arthroscopy and ligament repair visualization

process.title: Diagnostic Arthroscopy
process.desc: Confirming joint damage using a keyhole camera.

process.title: Precision Repair
process.desc: Reconstruction of ligaments or repair of cartilage.

process.title: Tailored Rehabilitation
process.desc: Progressive physiotherapy to ensure full mobility.

items.doctorExpertise: Knee stability is crucial for active living. Whether reconstructing a torn ACL or repairing damaged meniscus, our approach is minimally invasive and anatomically precise to get you back to your routine quickly.

items.title: Shoulder Treatment
items.desc: AC Joint Repair · Biceps Tendon Treatment · Collarbone Fracture Treatment · SLAP Tear Treatment · Rotator Cuff Repair · Shoulder Instability/Dislocation Treatment · Frozen Shoulder Treatment
items.intro: Shoulder injuries can severely restrict arm movement and affect daily life. We offer comprehensive solutions ranging from arthroscopic rotator cuff repairs to advanced stabilization for recurrent shoulder dislocations.

technology.title: Arthroscopic Rotator Cuff Repair & Stabilization
technology.content: Using high-definition shoulder arthroscopy, we repair torn tendons and stabilize the joint capsule through tiny incisions, ensuring minimal scarring and faster recovery.

process.title: Detailed Assessment
process.desc: MRI evaluation to identify soft tissue damage.

process.title: Keyhole Repair
process.desc: Arthroscopic suturing of rotator cuff or labral tear.

process.title: Dedicated Shoulder Rehab
process.desc: Graduated exercises to restore full range of motion.

items.doctorExpertise: The shoulder is our most mobile joint, making it highly susceptible to instability and rotator cuff tears. Arthroscopic repairs allow us to restore overhead function with minimal disruption to the surrounding muscle.

items.title: Hip Treatment
items.desc: Hip Arthroscopy · Labral Tear Repair · Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Treatment · Hip Fracture Repair · Avascular Necrosis Treatment · Hip Dysplasia Treatment · Hip Bursitis Treatment
items.intro: Hip pain, whether from a labral tear or Avascular Necrosis (AVN), requires early intervention. We offer specialized hip arthroscopy and muscle-sparing procedures to treat structural problems and protect the joint from long-term wear.

technology.title: Muscle-Sparing Hip Arthroscopy
technology.content: Hip arthroscopy allows us to access the deep hip joint to trim bony overgrowths (FAI) and repair torn labral cartilage without major incisions, preserving the key stability muscles.
technology.imageCaption: Advanced hip joint mapping and labral repair

process.title: Structural Analysis
process.desc: Advanced imaging to map the hip bone and cartilage.

process.title: Decompression & Repair
process.desc: Removing bone impingement and suturing the labrum.

process.title: Controlled Rehabilitation
process.desc: Specialized exercises to protect and strengthen the hip.

items.doctorExpertise: Hip preservation is our priority. By performing early hip arthroscopy for impingement and labral tears, we can prevent or significantly delay the onset of severe arthritis, keeping you active.

items.title: Elbow Treatment
items.desc: Tennis Elbow Treatment · Golfer's Elbow Treatment · Elbow Arthroscopy · Elbow Ligament (UCL) Reconstruction · Elbow Fracture Repair · Elbow Dislocation Treatment · Cubital Tunnel Syndrome Treatment
items.intro: From tennis elbow to complex elbow dislocations, we diagnose and treat injuries affecting this critical hinge joint. Our focus is on restoring pain-free extension, flexion, and rotation.

technology.title: Elbow Arthroscopy & Ligament Reconstruction
technology.content: Minimally invasive elbow arthroscopy helps remove loose bodies and treat tennis elbow. For overhead athletes with ligament tears, we perform Tommy John surgery (UCL Reconstruction).

process.title: Conservative Therapy
process.desc: PRP injections or targeted physiotherapy for tendonitis.

process.title: Surgical Repair
process.desc: Arthroscopic release or open reconstruction for unstable joints.

process.title: Progressive Recovery
process.desc: Guided occupational and physical therapy.

items.doctorExpertise: Elbow stiffness can be highly disabling. By utilizing minimally invasive arthroscopy for debris removal and advanced reconstructions for ligament stability, we restore smooth hinge movement.

items.title: Wrist & Hand Treatment
items.desc: Carpal Tunnel Release · Trigger Finger Release · De Quervain's Tenosynovitis Treatment · Wrist Fracture Surgery · Hand & Finger Fracture Repair · Ganglion Cyst Removal · Wrist Arthroscopy · Hand/Wrist Tendon Repair, Scaphoid fracture treatment
items.intro: Hands are our primary tools for interaction. We address carpal tunnel syndrome, trigger fingers, and complex wrist fractures using microscopic techniques to preserve touch and dexterity.

technology.title: Microsurgical Nerve Decompression & Tendon Repair
technology.content: We perform endoscopic carpal tunnel release for rapid recovery, and use specialized microsurgical sutures to repair delicate hand nerves and tendons.
technology.imageCaption: Fine microsurgical instruments used in hand reconstruction

process.title: Micro-assessment
process.desc: Testing nerve conduction and joint function.

process.title: Micro-surgery
process.desc: Nerve decompression or tendon repair under magnification.

process.title: Custom Splinting & Rehab
process.desc: Hand therapy to restore fine motor skills.

items.doctorExpertise: Reconstructing the hand is a delicate art. Under high magnification, we repair microscopic nerves and tendons to restore the intricate mechanics and sensation of your fingers.

items.title: Foot & Ankle Treatment
items.desc: Ankle Fracture Surgery · Ankle Ligament Reconstruction · Achilles Tendon Repair · Plantar Fasciitis Treatment · Hallux Valgus (Bunion) Correction · Flat Foot Correction · Foot & Ankle Arthroscopy · Diabetic Foot Care, Ankle Sprain (ATFL Repair), Tendon Repair
items.intro: Proper foot and ankle alignment is essential for balance and gait. We treat sports injuries, structural deformities like bunions, and chronic conditions like plantar fasciitis.

technology.title: Ankle Arthroscopy & Achilles Reconstruction
technology.content: Minimally invasive ankle arthroscopy is used to clear bone spurs and repair ligaments. For Achilles ruptures, we perform high-strength repairs allowing early weight-bearing.

process.title: Gait Analysis
process.desc: Assessing biomechanical issues of the foot.

process.title: Reconstruction
process.desc: Realigning bones, repairing tendons, or arthroscopic cleaning.

process.title: Orthotic Support & Training
process.desc: Custom insoles and walking rehabilitation.

items.doctorExpertise: The foot and ankle support your entire body weight. Restoring stability to the ankle joint and repairing tendons with advanced techniques ensures pain-free walking and running.

items.title: Spine Treatment
items.desc: Disc Herniation Treatment · Spinal Fusion Surgery · Sciatica Treatment · Scoliosis Treatment · Spinal Stenosis Treatment · Vertebral Compression Fracture Treatment · Spinal Trauma Management, Epidural block for Disc Herniation, Spinal Fracture, Sciatica, Spondylosis
items.intro: Chronic back pain and radiating nerve pain can be exhausting. Our treatment protocols prioritize conservative therapy first, followed by microsurgical spinal decompression or fusion if necessary.

technology.title: Minimally Invasive Spine Surgery (MISS)
technology.content: Using specialized tubular retractors and microscopes, we treat disc slips and spinal stenosis through incisions less than an inch long, preserving normal spine structure.

process.title: Diagnostics & Mapping
process.desc: High-resolution MRI and nerve mapping.

process.title: Micro-Decompression
process.desc: Removing disc fragments to relieve nerve roots.

process.title: Core Stabilization
process.desc: Specialized physical therapy to build spine support.

items.doctorExpertise: Spine surgery has evolved dramatically. With microsurgical spinal decompression, we relieve severe sciatica pain immediately through a tiny keyhole incision, ensuring a safe and rapid recovery.

items.title: Pediatric Orthopaedics
items.desc: Clubfoot Treatment · Developmental Hip Dysplasia · Growth Plate Fracture Care · Pediatric Limb Deformity Correction · Pediatric Sports Injuries
items.intro: Children's bones are still growing, making orthopedic care highly specialized. We provide gentle, expert treatments for congenital conditions like clubfoot and developmental hip dysplasia.

technology.title: Ponseti Method & Growth Modulation
technology.content: We use non-surgical serial casting (Ponseti method) for clubfoot correction. For limb deformities, we perform minimally invasive growth plate modulation (guided growth) to straighten legs naturally.
technology.imageCaption: Guided growth plating technique for children

process.title: Pediatric Evaluation
process.desc: Assessing gait, bone alignment, and growth potential.

process.title: Gentle Correction
process.desc: Casting, bracing, or minimally invasive growth modulation.

process.title: Growth Monitoring
process.desc: Scheduled follow-ups to ensure correct alignment as the child grows.

items.doctorExpertise: Children are not miniature adults. Their growing bones require specialized techniques like guided growth to correct deformities without affecting their future development.

items.title: Sports Medicine
items.desc: Achilles Tendon Rupture Repair · Pectoralis Major Tendon Repair · Triceps Tendon Rupture Surgery · Sports Hernia Treatment · Stress Fracture Management · Return-to-Sport Rehabilitation, Supraspinatus Tendon tear
items.intro: Sports injuries require a unique recovery path focused on speed, power, and coordination. We offer surgical repair for tendon ruptures (Achilles, triceps, pectoralis) and customized rehabilitation programs.

technology.title: High-Strength Tendon Repair & Biologics
technology.content: We use ultra-strong fiber-wire sutures for tendon repair alongside regenerative therapies (PRP) to speed up cellular healing and restore pre-injury performance.

process.title: Injury Staging
process.desc: Evaluating structural tears versus stress responses.

process.title: Biological Repair
process.desc: Minimally invasive repair combined with growth factor therapies.

process.title: Return-to-Play Program
process.desc: Specific athletic training to restore joint load capacity.

items.doctorExpertise: Athletic injuries demand a precise balance of mechanical strength and rapid healing. We combine bio-absorbable anchors with regenerative therapies to help you return to your sport safely.

items.title: Joint Replacement Surgeries
items.desc: Total Knee Replacement · Partial/Unicompartmental Knee Replacement(microplasty) · Total Hip Replacement · Shoulder Replacement (Total/Reverse) · Revision Joint Replacement · Robotic-Assisted Joint Replacement
items.intro: Joint replacement can restore pain-free life to individuals suffering from severe arthritis. With over 10,000 replacements performed, Dr. Jinsiwale is a pioneer in computer-navigated and robotic-assisted surgeries.

technology.title: Robotic Navigation & High-Flex Implants
technology.content: Infrared computerized navigation builds a 3D model of your joint in real-time, allowing sub-millimeter precision in bone cuts and implant placement, maximizing joint longevity.
technology.imageCaption: Robotic navigation knee replacement screen representation

process.title: Computer Mapping
process.desc: Real-time registration of joint anatomy during surgery.

process.title: Precision Implantation
process.desc: Custom positioning of advanced ceramic/cobalt implants.

process.title: Rapid Recovery Protocol
process.desc: Walking without support in 24-48 hours.

items.doctorExpertise: A joint replacement is a lifetime investment. Using computerized robotic navigation ensures that the mechanical axis is perfectly aligned, resulting in a joint that feels entirely natural.

items.title: Reconstructive & Regenerative Surgeries
items.desc: Stromal Vascular Fraction (SVF) Therapy · Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) Therapy · Stem Cell Therapy · Cartilage Regeneration & Restoration · Ligament & Tendon Reconstruction · Bone Grafting & Bone Regeneration · Complex Joint Reconstruction · Limb Reconstruction Surgery · Revision Surgery (Joint/Ligament) · Custom 3D-Printed Implants
items.intro: Regenerative medicine is reshaping orthopedic treatment. We offer cutting-edge biological therapies (SVF, PRP, Stem Cells) to heal damaged cartilage and tendons naturally, avoiding surgery.

technology.title: Stromal Vascular Fraction (SVF) & Cartilage Regeneration
technology.content: SVF therapy uses your body's own adipose cells containing healing factors to treat early joint wear. Combined with cartilage restoration, it promotes natural repair.
technology.imageCaption: Laboratory processing of autologous growth factors

process.title: Harvesting
process.desc: Acquiring concentrated healing factors from patient's own tissue.

process.title: Processing
process.desc: Centrifugation under sterile conditions to concentrate growth factors.

process.title: Targeted Injection
process.desc: Guided placement into the damaged joint or tendon.

items.doctorExpertise: Regenerative therapy represents a huge leap in medicine. By utilizing your body's own healing resources, we can regenerate cartilage and repair ligaments without invasive surgery.

items.title: Traumatology
items.desc: Polytrauma Management · Open (Compound) Fracture Treatment · Pelvic Fracture Surgery · Acetabular Fracture Surgery · Complex Articular/Intra-articular Fracture Surgery · Periprosthetic Fracture Treatment · Non-Union & Mal-Union Fracture Correction · Bone Infection (Osteomyelitis) Management · Limb Lengthening & Deformity Correction (Ilizarov/External Fixation) · Fracture Fixation — Plating, Intramedullary Nailing, External Fixators · Pediatric Trauma Care
items.intro: Traumatology involves the treatment of severe, complex, and multiple skeletal injuries. Dr. Jinsiwale is a pioneer in complex fracture fixations, non-union corrections, and limb lengthening procedures.

technology.title: Intramedullary Nailing & Ilizarov Fixation
technology.content: We use advanced titanium plating and intramedullary locking nails for strong fracture fixation. For non-unions, external Ilizarov fixators stimulate bone growth and correct deformities.
technology.imageCaption: Advanced fracture reconstruction and plating visualization

process.title: Emergency Stabilization
process.desc: Immediate care and alignment of fractured bones.

process.title: Rigid Fixation
process.desc: Plating or nailing to allow early mobilization and prevent joint stiffness.

process.title: Union Monitoring & Rehab
process.desc: Progressive weight-bearing and physiotherapy.

items.doctorExpertise: A complex or neglected fracture requires careful mechanical planning. Our objective is stable, anatomically precise fixation that allows the patient to stand and move as early as possible.

items.title: Rehabilitation Programme
items.desc: Post-Surgical Physiotherapy · Sports Injury Rehabilitation · Pain Management Programs
items.intro: Rehabilitation is critical to the success of any orthopedic treatment. Our tailored physiotherapy programs focus on restoring strength, flexibility, balance, and coordination.

technology.title: Targeted Rehabilitation & Pain Management
technology.content: We utilize advanced modalities along with manual therapy and customized exercise prescription to ensure rapid muscle strengthening and safe recovery from joint surgery.

process.title: Assessment
process.desc: Detailed range-of-motion and muscle strength baseline testing.

process.title: Targeted Therapy
process.desc: Pain relief modalities and active-passive exercises.

process.title: Functional Independence
process.desc: Balance and gait training for daily independence.

items.doctorExpertise: Surgery is only half the battle. A dedicated, structured physiotherapy program is essential to rebuild muscle strength and achieve the full range of joint movement.

contact.title: Book Your Consultation
contact.address: A-8 MIG Colony, Near Sanjivani Nursing Home, Behind Axis Bank, A.B. Road, Indore (M.P.)

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Real stories of recovery from our patients.

items.name: Mrs. Anjali Saxena
items.quote: I was walking without support in 24 hours. The robotic precision made all the difference.

items.name: Mr. Rajesh Verma
items.quote: Pain-free after 10 years. Dr. Jinsiwale gave me my life back.

items.name: Mr. Suresh Gupta
items.quote: I can now climb stairs easily. The recovery was faster than I expected.

items.name: Mrs. Kavita Joshi
items.quote: My shoulder pain is completely gone. Minimum invasive surgery works wonders.

items.name: Mr. Amit Patel
items.quote: Back to sports in 6 months! Dr. Jinsiwale is truly an expert.

items.name: Mrs. Sunita Devi
items.quote: I was bedridden for months. Now I walk daily in the park. Thank you!

items.name: Mr. Vikram Singh
items.quote: Excellent care and guidance throughout the process. Highly recommended.

items.name: Mrs. Meena Sharma
items.quote: Technology makes a huge difference. Accurate alignment means less pain.

items.name: Mr. Rahul Jain
items.quote: After my accident, I lost hope. Dr. Jinsiwale reconstructed my leg perfectly.

items.name: Mrs. Padmawati R.
items.quote: My second surgery here corrected the issues from a previous one elsewhere.

locations.title: Serving Patients Across Central India
locations.subtitle: World-class orthopedic care, worth the travel.

items.text: Centrally located on AB Road (Near LIG Square)
Evening OPD for Working Professionals (6 PM - 8 PM)

cities.name: Ujjain
cities.heading: Advanced Knee & Hip Replacement for Ujjain Residents
cities.whyTravel: While Ujjain offers basic medical care, complex Joint Replacements require the precision of Robotic Navigation found at RECONS. We have treated over 2,000 patients from Ujjain, offering special 'Fast-Track' discharge protocols for outstation patients.

connectivity.train: Direct trains to Indore Jn. (1 hr)
connectivity.landmark: Clinic is located on AB Road, easily accessible from the highway entry.

cities.name: Dewas
cities.heading: Expert Orthopedic Care near Dewas
cities.whyTravel: Located just 45 minutes away, RECONS is the preferred choice for Dewas families seeking revision surgeries or complex trauma care. Don't compromise on technology—access Central India's leading Navigation Knee Replacement setup with a short drive.

connectivity.road: Direct access via AB Road (Agra-Bombay Hwy).
connectivity.landmark: We are located directly on AB Road near LIG Square.

cities.name: Ratlam
cities.heading: Premium Joint Surgery for Ratlam Patients
cities.whyTravel: For life-changing surgeries like Spine or Hip Replacement, distance should not be a barrier. Dr. Jinsiwale's 'Patient Specific Technology' ensures your implant lasts a lifetime. We offer priority appointment slots for Ratlam patients to ensure same-day consultation and planning.

connectivity.train: Major junction with direct superfast trains to Indore.
connectivity.landmark: Assistance with nearby hotel stay for family members.
